subject: Fw: Re: HOLIDAYS
body:
FYI..

-----Forwarded Message-----
>From: Maemarcia@aol.com
>Sent: Jan 5, 2008 8:53 AM
>To: kellens@earthlink.net
>Subject: Re: HOLIDAYS
>
>Planning to so to NewYork tomorrow as planned.  Bruce teaching  at Cardoza 
>Law monday-thurs or friday.  I had epidural yesterday.   Need to see how I feel 
>today but so don't Not want to go.  Wish we had a  later flight so don't leave 
>here so early.  I'm never  an early girl  anyway and now I'm even in slower 
>gear and will no matter what be carrying  winter crappola I'm not used to.
>Also , never got better at packing - my childhood insecurities  still 
>persist.  We all have something from the past darlin"  !
>So I'll SCHLEPP  (a simple Yiddish word - ask Jeffrey)   He's been a bit out 
>of touch, sure he's got plenty else on his mind , hopefullly  good things
>How are you ?  Have you been home yet ?  or back to  N.Y>  ?
>If I'm really hung up, hate to ask and I guess it's J. i need to  ask , maybe 
>can try for Jo-Jo  if need be under the circumstances .  I  hesitate to ask .
>Get in touch.  I hope all OK  there for you  guys.
>Best,  Marcia            954-296-0002

body_html:
FYI..

-----Forwarded Message-----

From: Maemarcia@aol.com
Sent: Jan 5, 2008 8:53 AM
To: kellens@earthlink.net
Subject: Re: HOLIDAYS

Planning to so to NewYork tomorrow as planned. Bruce teaching at Cardoza
Law monday-thurs or friday. I had epidural yesterday. Need to see how I feel
today but so don't Not want to go. Wish we had a later flight so don't leave
here so early. I'm never an early girl anyway and now I'm even in slower
gear and will no matter what be carrying winter crappola I'm not used to.
Also , never got better at packing - my childhood insecurities still
persist. We all have something from the past darlin" !
So I'll SCHLEPP (a simple Yiddish word - ask Jeffrey) He's been a bit out
of touch, sure he's got plenty else on his mind , hopefullly good things
How are you ? Have you been home yet ? or back to N.Y> ?
If I'm really hung up, hate to ask and I guess it's J. i need to ask , maybe
can try for Jo-Jo if need be under the circumstances . I hesitate to ask .
Get in touch. I hope all OK there for you guys.
Best, Marcia 954-296-0002

Marcia M.
